[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 00010000 1
2 00011000 2
3 01111000 4
4 11000000 2
5 10000000 1
6 11001111 6
7 01010101 4

01 10 10000000 1 match 5
12 21 10000000 1 match 5
23 32 01000101 3
34 43 00010100 2 match 0
45 54 00010000 1 match 1
56 65 00011000 2 match 2
67 76 01111000 4 match 3
70 07 01000000 1

02 20 11000000 2 match 4
13 31 00000000 a
24 42 10000100 2
35 53 00010001 2
46 64 00010100 2 match 0
57 75 00011010 3
60 06 01000000 1
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 01000000 1
14 41 10000000 1 match 5
25 52 00001011 3
36 63 01010100 3
47 74 00010000 1 match 1
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00000000 a
72 27 01001010 3

04 40 10000000 1 match 5
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 01001100 3
37 73 01010000 2
